name: @gjsify/example-dom-canvas2d-confetti
description: Falling confetti Canvas 2D example, adapted from https://codepen.io/linrock/pen/nMadjQ

scripts.build: yarn build:gjs && yarn build:browser && yarn build:assets
scripts.build:assets: cp -f src/browser/index.html dist/index.html && cp -f src/browser/canvas2d.css dist/canvas2d.css

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
